title: BETWEEN clause not producing rangejoin
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE treeitems (tree TEXT, subject INTEGER, pre BIGINT, post BIGINT, size BIGINT, level SMALLINT, prob DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 1.0, CONSTRAINT treeitems_tree_pre_unique UNIQUE (tree, pre), CONSTRAINT treeitems_tree_post_unique UNIQUE (tree, post));
INSERT INTO treeitems (tree, subject, pre, post, size, level, prob) VALUES ('root', 1, 10, 20, 100, 1, 1.0);
INSERT INTO treeitems (tree, subject, pre, post, size, level, prob) VALUES ('root', 2, 15, 25, 150, 2, 0.5);
SELECT * FROM treeitems WHERE pre BETWEEN 5 AND 15;
SELECT * FROM treeitems WHERE post BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(post) FROM treeitems) AND (SELECT MAX(post) FROM treeitems);
key_bug_features: BETWEEN clause fails to produce rangejoin
